summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Replay Insights Summary feature for Philos Orientation app. Backend API (GET /api/memory/replay-insights/{user_id}) fully tested with 10/10 tests passing. Frontend ReplayInsightsSummarySection renders correctly with Hebrew RTL layout, bar charts, transition patterns, blind spots, and behavioral insights.
critical_code_review_comments: All required data-testid attributes present (replay-insights-summary-section, alt-path-bar-{tag}, transition-pattern-{idx}, insight-text-{idx}, blind-spot-{idx})
Hebrew RTL layout correctly implemented for all components
Bar charts show percentages with proper Hebrew value labels (תרומה, סדר, התאוששות)
Transition patterns display 'from → to' with Hebrew labels and counts
Blind spots section styled with amber warning colors
Summary stats grid shows total replays, patterns count, and blind spots count
Component properly conditionally renders only when total_replays > 0
seed_data_creation: Created 6 replay records for test user with patterns: harm→contribution (x2), harm→recovery, avoidance→order, avoidance→contribution, recovery→order
context_for_next_testing_agent: Replay Insights Summary feature fully tested. Backend API returns correct aggregated data including alternative_path_counts, transition_patterns, blind_spots, insights, and recent_replay_count. Frontend component correctly displays all sections with Hebrew RTL layout. Test data exists for user_id=philos-orient.

frontend_tests: Hebrew header 'סיכום תובנות הפעלה חוזרת' displays - PASS
Bar charts show alt-path-bar-{tag} elements (3 bars) - PASS
Transition patterns show transition-pattern-{idx} (5 patterns) - PASS
Blind spots section shows blind-spot-{idx} (3 spots) - PASS
Hebrew insights display insight-text-{idx} (4 insights) - PASS
Summary stats grid shows total=6, patterns=5, blind_spots=3 - PASS
Component hides when no replay data - PASS

features_verified.bar_chart: Shows most explored alternative paths with Hebrew labels and percentages
features_verified.transition_patterns: Displays 'מ{from} ל{to}' patterns with counts (e.g., 'נזק → תרומה 2 פעמים')
features_verified.blind_spots: Amber-styled section showing unexplored positive transitions
features_verified.hebrew_insights: 4 numbered behavioral insights generated based on patterns
features_verified.summary_stats: 3-column grid showing סה״כ הפעלות, דפוסי מעבר, נקודות עיוורות
features_verified.refresh_trigger: Component re-fetches when replayCount prop changes
